author: orionriver@gmail.com
text: Spec FROZEN to docs/architecture.md (bl-cac0, delivered f30640b). Build against that path — the authoritative §0-§17 greenfield reference — not the now-archived working ball bl-2e26. Substantive design changes need a new design ball + a §15 revision-log entry in the doc; corrections to already-built phases stay tracked here under bl-72a8.

author: github-issues
text: GH issue #307 no longer found in repo (on_external_delete=deferred)

author: Unlearn
text: SUBSTRATE CHANGE (bl-8540, merged e9b44cc, 2026-06-07): the plugin-wiring model is no longer the filesystem symlink registry. §2/§4/§6 now put the hook SCHEDULE in a committed, §4-layered config/plugins.toml — a [hooks] table mapping <op>.<phase> -> an ORDERED LIST of plugin names (list position = run order; tracker last because it is last). config/plugins/bin/<name> (machine-local gitignored binary symlinks) is UNCHANGED. Every phase touching plugin wiring/dispatch/install/seed builds against plugins.toml, NOT config/plugins/<op>/<phase>/NN-<name> symlinks. See §6 'The hook list is config' + the §15 entry.
